# auth notes

## access token web
- Contains: account_id
- sub (user ID)
- exp (expiry)
```sh
access_token_web=eyJraWQiOiJFNTdZZHJ1SHBsQWp1MmNObzFEb3JIM2oyN0J1NS1zX09QNVB3UGlobjVNIiwiYWxnIjoiUFMyNTYifQ..oVPfdCWmD9IFTN__YWYEfd2MInb6GOBmCqoiOgZj33N-HDmwbtHxSzojBFKdWpi_sYUItTKMMnV3Fa6cuNLKTV2vPZmMsr36D3ZyuS47uCnfmRTb9PGZGj7Qmjfes-0RNAP3ScppXPoM--b-ueUqeWSLSzY5oAmtIotE90v-5uH8o-r7-7KNqssdx6GhYnSCZBvswEEtAUVZKy0FvrHOsi9XnMTkUeTsDA--v5M8aYqgig0mNVh_7fI15iYrF0OtFX1iME52RgP9YqsipRmj54tBlhOLEpN1rF1J7b2v7qBMzkMOz58gA3Hlsk_RjjH54wNyPfRy7vCuFAD7rpwsKA; 
```

## refresh token web
```sh
refresh_token_web=eyJraWQiOiJFNTdZZHJ1SHBsQWp1MmNObzFEb3JIM2oyN0J1NS1zX09QNVB3UGlobjVNIiwiYWxnIjoiUFMyNTYifQ..DHUawjMyvzG698sfVtYoP5UFdABatQHLHO6qI7KmI3sKFtnpr4IMAyAm3TTMCQ3a5r1o16WNrFji7kvR80JLIhPrIDx-Mphc4WLxJS9tYTv3Nwo4MbZoPabO9SOysxiaPMTxhWxr7trZUh6f6t08hbEg_bESwJd9CH9111_GFPlBiFlqg7w08RtP59GaW-4wj07TTY9EHbiAhSo7UUQDizlM_AAZ5OfKhbkRwcfkXDaj5xBQiqwR6B_VT35KPnkGOC21tsnevyKnrH2MDrKTXRI46yiPFHvVqLoBPHrtnLdmRR-Ro_uf_4dDewStcoMITvMmyC8l4klhSMtoLrX59Q; 
```

## vinted fr session
- Type: Server-side session cookie (likely Rails-style encrypted)
- Purpose: Backend session state
- Important: Might be tied to CSRF/session validation
```sh
_vinted_fr_--f67549098d938720c7f4cad10dd454c7aa69d42b; 
```

## numeric user identifier
```sh
v_uid=3142536479;
```
## session identifier
```sh
v_sid=8f880ee2-1773771438;
```
